chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Acknowledgment of Debt by a Sick Person in Favor of an Heir

text: 5541 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لَهُ اَلرَّجُلُ يُقِرُّ لِوَارِثٍ بِدَيْنٍ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالَ "يَجُوزُ إِذَا كَانَ مَلِيّاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5541 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
'I asked Imam (as) about a man who acknowledges a debt to one of his heirs.'
Imam (as) said: "It is permissible if he is solvent (financially capable)."
